summary: The team approved a two-week, synthetic-data pilot and assigned three preparation tasks with explicit owners and dates.

decisions.text: Run a two-week pilot of the meeting action tracker.
decisions.evidence: We approved a two-week pilot for the meeting action tracker.

decisions.text: Use synthetic transcripts only during phase one.
decisions.evidence: Phase one must use synthetic transcripts only.

actions.evidence: Omar: I will prepare the reviewer guidance by 22 July 2026.
Lina: I will configure the evaluation dashboard by 24 July 2026.
Maya: I will schedule the pilot review for 27 July 2026.
